title: Coastal Collective
description: A Melbourne-based fashion brand with a loyal online community. We rebuilt their social strategy from the ground up, leaning into UGC, Reels, and TikTok Shop.
body:
## The Brief

Coastal Collective came to us with a strong brand identity and loyal customer base, but a social presence that wasn't converting. They had followers — they just weren't buying.

## Our Approach

We audited their existing content and identified three core problems: inconsistent posting, no clear content pillars, and a mismatch between their brand aesthetic and what was actually performing on the platform.

We rebuilt their strategy around three content pillars: product showcases (30%), lifestyle content (40%), and UGC (30%).

## The Results

In six months, social-attributed revenue grew by 240%. Instagram followers grew by 85K organically. Average engagement rate sits at 4.8% — more than double the industry average.
